channel.title: Intro on Jetluck
channel.description: Recent content in Intro on Jetluck

item.title: Why I Started Ngeseries
item.description:
Why I Started Ngeseries

After finishing my second semester, I decided to build a habit: write consistently and learn in public.

This website is the result of that decision.

I call it Ngeseries — a small writing series where I document what I learn while studying and building things.

It has three tracks:

1. Ngemath

Focused on mathematics, especially:

  • linear algebra
  • vectors
  • mathematical foundations for AI

2. NgeCP

Focused on competitive programming:

  • algorithms
  • problem solving
  • coding patterns

3. Ngoding

Focused on software engineering:

  • backend development
  • side projects
  • engineering lessons

Why writing?

Because writing forces clarity.

If I can explain something clearly, it usually means I understand it.

If I cannot, it means I still need to learn.

My goal

Not perfection.

Consistency.

One post every three days.

Let’s see where this goes.
